items.headline: जापान में मतदान ख़त्म हुआ, जानिए किस पार्टी के जीतने की है संभावना
whyItMatters: इमेज स्रोत, ANI आम आदमी पार्टी के दिल्ली प्रदेश के अध्यक्ष सौरभ भारद्वाज ने बताया है कि उन्हें पुलिस ने हिरासत में ले लिया है. समाचार एजेंसी एएनआई की तरफ से सोशल मीडिया एक्स पर साझा किए गए एक वीडियो म
summaryParagraphs: इमेज स्रोत, ANI आम आदमी पार्टी के दिल्ली प्रदेश के अध्यक्ष सौरभ भारद्वाज ने बताया है कि उन्हें पुलिस ने हिरासत में ले लिया है. समाचार एजेंसी एएनआई की तरफ से सोशल मीडिया एक्स पर साझा किए गए एक वीडियो में सौरभ भारद्वाज को पुलिस की गाड़ी में बैठते हुए भी देखा जा सकता है. सौरभ भारद्वाज और आम आदमी पार्टी के कई कार्यकर्ता जनकपुरी में उसी जगह इकट्ठा होने का प्रयास कर रहे थे, जहां बीते दिनों कमल ध्यानी नाम के एक युवक की गड्ढे में गिरने से मौत हो गई थी. सौरभ भारद्वाज ने कहा , "आप तानाशाही का स्तर देख सकते हैं. किसी ने कोई शिकायत दर्ज नहीं की, जबकि कमल ध्यानी के माता-पिता छह पुलिस स्टेशनों में गए थे. जब हम सब उन्हें श्रद्धांजलि देने के लिए इकट्ठा हुए हैं, तो पुलिस हमें हिरासत में ले रही है." इससे पहले सौरभ भारद्वाज ने एक पोस्ट में लिखा था, “आज हम जनकपुरी में मारे गए कमल ध्यानी को श्रद्धांजलि देने पहुंचे थे. पुलिस ने जगह जगह आज बैरिकेड लगा दिए. हमने कहा कोई नारेबाज़ी नहीं हो रही , सिर्फ़ मोमबत्ती जलाकर चले जाएँगे.” उन्होंने आरोप लगाया, “क्या अब इतना भी करना अपराध है?” इमेज स्रोत, @Saura For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: E-Way Bill generation surged second all-time high in Jan
whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 The Eco­nomic Sur­vey for FY26 said that the n
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 The Eco­nomic Sur­vey for FY26 said that the next wave of GST reforms could focus on reima­gin­ing the e-way bill sys­tem as a facil­it­ator of smooth logist­ics rather than only as a tool for enforce­ment and con­trol. Reflecting buoyant economic activity and increased compliance, E Way Bill generation surged to its second all-time high at over 13.68 crore in January, data from GST Network portal showed. However, experts do not appear much excited about. Previous all-time high was 13.84 crore. This means generation January declined by little over 1 per cent. However, it is higher by around 16 per cent as compared to January of 2025 and over 42 per cent as compared to January of 2024. An e-way bill is an electronic document generated on a portal, evidencing the movement of goods. It also indicates whether tax has been paid for the mov For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Higher HRA benefits extended to these new cities
whyItMatters: Synopsis Taxpayers in Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune, and Ahmedabad can soon benefit from increased house rent allowance tax relief. The government proposes extending the 50% HRA exemption to these cities
summaryParagraphs: Synopsis Taxpayers in Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune, and Ahmedabad can soon benefit from increased house rent allowance tax relief. The government proposes extending the 50% HRA exemption to these cities under the old tax regime. This change, effective April 1, 2026, aims to provide significant savings for salaried individuals. Taxpayers residing in cities such as Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune and Ahmedabad in a rented accommodation are set to get a significant tax relief as the government has proposed the expansion of 50% house rent allowance ( HRA ) exemption under the old tax regime . Income Tax Guide Income Tax Union Budget FY 2026-27 Live Income Tax Slabs FY 2025-26 Income Tax Calculator 2025 So far, cities where taxpayers following the old tax regime get up to 50% exemption on HRA are Mumbai, New Delhi, Kolkata and Chennai. The draft says that for all other cities across India, exemption on HRA will be 40%. 50% HRA exemption city-criteria under old tax regime Category City Existing Mum For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Malaysia seeks revision of air traffic rights to increase India flights
whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 u | Photo Credit: VELANKANNI RAJ Malaysia has
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 u | Photo Credit: VELANKANNI RAJ Malaysia has sought enhancement of air traffic rights hat will enable its carriers to increase flights to India. The request was put forth in the delegation level talks between Prime Minister Narendra Modi and his Malaysian counterpart Anwar Ibrahim on Sunday. While both the sides agreed to deepen their co-operation in aviation, there was no commitment from India to enhance the bilateral air traffic rights. According to the joint statement, both the leaders re-affirmed their commitment to strengthen air connectivity between Malaysia and India in spirit of mutual trust, mutual benefit and win-win co-operation. The two sides also agreed to further deepen their co-operation in civil aviation recognising the continued growth in passenger demand. “In this context the Malaysian side proposed to further enhan For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: NSE’s average daily turnover in cash segment hits 15-month high
whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Number of stocks traded on the NSE was down at
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Number of stocks traded on the NSE was down at 3,911 in January against 4,020 in December as investors narrowed their stock selection. | Photo Credit: FRANCIS MASCARENHAS The average daily turnover (ADT) in the equity cash segment on the NSE has hit a 15-month high of ₹1,19,560 crore in January, an increase of 27 per cent compared to ₹94,496 crore logged in December, as retail investors used the fall in the markets to stock-up and cut down on their losses. ADT was up 24 per cent year-on-year compared to ₹96,167 registered in January, 2025. Overall, turnover in the cash segment on the exchange increased 14 per cent last month to ₹24 lakh crore against ₹21 lakh crore logged in December. The cash market turnover jumped 9 per cent year-on-year. However, the number of stocks traded on the NSE was down at 3,911 last month against 4,020 in D For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Mid-size IT firms slow hiring as AI boosts productivity
whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Now with companies pivoting towards AI in a bi
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Now with companies pivoting towards AI in a big way, this slowdown is likely to become more prominent, tightening the hiring safety net in India’s IT services sector | Photo Credit: xavierarnau Mid-size IT companies moderated hiring in the December quarter as many reported higher revenue per employee driven by AI productivity. In the latest quarter, mid-size firms Coforge, KPIT Technologies, Mphasis, Hexaware and LTIMindtree collectively reported half the net adds of the previous quarter; from over 4,000 employees in Q2 to over 2,000 employees in Q3. Firms like KPIT lessened workforce by 155 employees in Q3. Many officials attributed the slowdown to the advent of AI. While these companies continue to perform better than large-cap firms that have been showing a downward trend in hiring for the past couple of quarters, the cautious appr For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

whyItMatters: England narrowly defeated Nepal by four runs in their T20 World Cup opener at the Wankhede Stadium. Despite a valiant chase from Nepal, who needed ten runs in the final over, England's Sam Curran held
summaryParagraphs: England narrowly defeated Nepal by four runs in their T20 World Cup opener at the Wankhede Stadium. Despite a valiant chase from Nepal, who needed ten runs in the final over, England's Sam Curran held his nerve. Earlier, half-centuries from Jacob Bethell and Harry Brook propelled England to 184 for seven. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Times of India.

items.headline: Elon Musk denies Starlink phone: CEO says no device in works
whyItMatters: Elon Musk has officially denied reports of SpaceX developing a Starlink phone, stating "We are not developing a phone." This clarification comes amidst speculation about the satellite internet busines
summaryParagraphs: Elon Musk has officially denied reports of SpaceX developing a Starlink phone, stating "We are not developing a phone." This clarification comes amidst speculation about the satellite internet business's expansion ahead of a potential IPO. Musk has previously expressed strong reluctance towards phone manufacturing. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Times of India.
